title: MYTHCRAFT5
description: A RPG Minecraft Modpack focused on leveling up and exploration.
body:
![mythcraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ced67bbf4f1cc0721d69dab4f643e2c29b50325_0.webp)
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### ! This project is activley update on curseforge, this is due to modrinths content moderation policy not allowing key mods in the modpack to be shared here on modrinth, for a more complete, actively maintained experience use the cureforge version

**MYTHCRAFT 5, All About: Exploration - Questing - Looting - Progression**

Mythcraft is an expansive, feature-rich modpack that blends magic, alchemy, and technology into one seamless playthrough. Discover over a thousand new and reimagined structures packed with unique loot and challenges. Follow a custom central questline with a deep progression tree that lets you shape your playstyle through upgradable skills, powerful magical abilities, and unique combat perks. With an overhauled combat system, you can master both weapons and spells as you battle through dungeons, strongholds, and strange new dimensions filled with bosses, traps, and treasure.

Mythcraft receives frequent updates to keep the world feeling fresh, exciting, and full of surprises. It’s an ambitious, ever-evolving modpack with a long roadmap of planned custom modded features—designed to grow, improve, and become the best adventure experience it can be.

## Key Features:
- Custom GUI Style – A fully redesigned interface that gives Mythcraft its own distinct look and feel.
- Complete Questing System – Follow a structured but flexible questline that guides your progression.
- Custom Look and Feel – Unique textures across items, GUIs, structures.
- Redesigned Enchanting System – A fresh take on enchanting with a new rune based approach
- Overhauled Food – A more rewarding farming experience with expanded crops, recipes, and progression.
- Expanded Dungeons & Bosses – More structures, dungeons, and boss encounters to conquer.
- Custom Mods – Two Custom built mods, one for questing another for enchanting,  with more in the works
-  (Boundless: Quests and Runic: Enchantments)

## Unique Gameplay Features
- Quests: the quests are found in the inventory, or hotbar a blue book, here you will find all your Quests. If for whatever reason you wish to play without quests (or add your own) the pack that contains the quest is located under resource packs, using  /Boundless reload will apply your changes
Learn more 

- Enchanting / Runes: This pack uses a custom rune system for enchanting, runes are found from mobs and structures and are applied to your gear and weapons in an etching table, each gear peice has rune slots which show how many enchants that item can hold. To clarify vanilla enchanted books and enchanting tables do not exist in this pack.
- Weapons: This pack uses a Weapons mod called Arsenal, it adds 12 new weapon types, and in addition to the re:Enforced mod, adds 4 new tiers of weapons and gear including copper, steel, rose gold and platinum. 
- Artifacts: This pack uses a custom artifact System from the Arcane: Artifacts mod, it adds 25 new artifacts that when equipped in the offhand grant unique abilities, these artifacts are found in loot chests
- Skills: This pack uses a custom skills system from the Codex mod, and in conjunction with the LevelUP APi adds a level system, skill points and unique skills that allow you to level up dynamically as you play
- These mods were developed by myself and my team. If you encounter any issues or would like to submit feedback, join the discord.

For more frequent updates go to the [ Mythcraft cursforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/mythcrafts)
